standard.name: Standard MOM
standard.description: Concise minutes with bullet points and participants
standard.prompt:
Generate a concise MOM STRICTLY in this format (be brief):

**DATE:** {date}

**PARTICIPANTS:**
- [List each participant]

**KEY DISCUSSION POINTS:**
- [Point 1]
- [Point 2]
- [Point 3]

**ACTION ITEMS:**
- [Action] - Owner: [Name]

**DECISIONS MADE:**
- [Decision 1]

Transcript: {transcript}

Keep it concise. Extract only essential information.

executive.name: Executive Summary
executive.description: High-level summary with bullet points and participants
executive.prompt:
Generate executive summary STRICTLY in this format (be concise):

**DATE:** {date}

**PARTICIPANTS:**
- [List participants]

**KEY DECISIONS:**
- [Decision 1]
- [Decision 2]

**CRITICAL ACTION ITEMS:**
- [Action] - Owner: [Name]

Transcript: {transcript}

Focus on executive-level decisions and impacts only.

technical.name: Technical Discussion
technical.description: Technical meeting minutes with bullet points and participants
technical.prompt:
Generate technical meeting minutes STRICTLY in this format (be brief):

**DATE:** {date}

**PARTICIPANTS:**
- [List participants]

**TECHNICAL TOPICS:**
- [Topic 1]
- [Topic 2]

**DECISIONS:**
- [Decision 1]
- [Decision 2]

**ACTION ITEMS:**
- [Task] - Owner: [Name]

Transcript: {transcript}

Focus on technical accuracy and actionability.

agile.name: Agile Standup
agile.description: Agile standup format with participants and bullet points
agile.prompt:
Generate Agile standup minutes STRICTLY in this format (be concise):

**DATE:** {date}

**PARTICIPANTS:**
- [List participants]

**YESTERDAY ACCOMPLISHED:**
- [Task 1]
- [Task 2]

**TODAY'S PLAN:**
- [Task 1]
- [Task 2]

**BLOCKERS:**
- [Blocker 1]

Transcript: {transcript}

Keep concise with clear action items.

client.name: Client Meeting
client.description: Client-facing meeting format with participants and bullet points
client.prompt:
Generate client-appropriate minutes STRICTLY in this format (be professional but brief):

**DATE:** {date}

**PARTICIPANTS:**
- [List participants]

**MEETING OBJECTIVE:**
- [Objective]

**CLIENT FEEDBACK:**
- [Feedback 1]
- [Feedback 2]

**NEXT STEPS:**
- [Step 1]
- [Step 2]

Transcript: {transcript}

Maintain professional tone. Focus on outcomes.

legal.name: Legal/Compliance
legal.description: Formal legal/compliance minutes with participants and bullet points
legal.prompt:
Generate legal meeting minutes STRICTLY in this format (be formal but concise):

**DATE:** {date}

**PARTICIPANTS:**
- [List participants]

**AGREEMENTS:**
- [Agreement 1]
- [Agreement 2]

**LEGAL COMMITMENTS:**
- [Commitment 1]

**FOLLOW-UP REQUIREMENTS:**
- [Requirement] - Owner: [Name]

Transcript: {transcript}

Maintain formal legal language. Extract key commitments only.
